raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing regarding dispute XXXX and would like to request a further review of the determination. 

After reviewing the outcome and the documentation provided, it appears that the decision relied primarily on the merchants response without fully addressing the evidence I submitted as part of the dispute. 

Because the supporting materials I provided raise questions regarding the merchants claim, I respectfully request that this case be reviewed again with full consideration of the documentation previously submitted. 

If any additional clarification or documentation would assist in conducting a more complete review, I would be happy to provide it. 

Thank you for your time and attention. 

Sincerely,
